_comment: Curated snapshot of CITED third-party capability benchmarks for the model-catalog pipeline (Block I / T41). The benchmarks adapter (pipeline/adapters/benchmarks.mjs) reads this file and enriches the T40 `benchmarks` field. This file IS the matching table: each `models[]` entry maps a public, citable leaderboard score to a catalog (vendor, id). RULES: (1) numbers are a REFERENCE to `source`, never invented — refresh them from the leaderboard and bump `lastVerified`; (2) the adapter only enriches ids ALREADY in the catalog — a (vendor, id) not in the catalog is silently dropped (fail safe, never mis-attributed, never introduced); (3) every emitted benchmark is provenance-stamped (indicative + source + lastVerified). `models` ships EMPTY: populate it only with figures you have verified against the source. `_exampleModels` shows the entry shape and is NOT read by the adapter.
note: Cited third-party capability index — a reference, not our verdict. Verify at the source.
